---
title: "Data Upload Notes"
author: "Grace Hearne"
date: "2026-04-09"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
The vehicle and person data sets were to large to directly upload to GitHub so they are converted into rds. to save space. 

This step is not replicatable as you do not have access to the raw csvs for these 2. 

Below is the code that I used to generate them.
```{r}
#-----------------------------
# Load data from CSV
#-----------------------------
vehicle <- read.csv("vehicle copy.csv")
person <- read.csv("person copy.csv")
#-----------------------------
# Save as compressed RDS file
#-----------------------------
saveRDS(vehicle, "vehicle.rds", compress = "xz")
saveRDS(person(), "person.rds", compress = "xz")
```
